title: iberis linifolia subsp. balansae
intro: Iberis linifolia subsp. balansae, also known as the alpine candytuft, is a plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been found to have antimicrobial and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. Iberis linifolia subsp. balansae can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
